title: Magic Artillery resolve Magic Artillery D6 table

card.rawText: At the beginning of your turn, you may roll 1 die. If the result is: 6: Opponent must discard 1 Magic card. 2-5: Nothing happens. 1: Destroy this card.

effect.value: D6: 6 opponent discards 1 Magic; 2-5 nothing; 1 destroy this card
